db_notInitialized: Database not initialized, please call db.init() first
db_postgresOnlyPostgresql: PostgreSQL Provider only supports postgresql type
db_postgresTxQueryHint: In PostgreSQL transaction, please use await tx.query()
db_postgresTxGetHint: In PostgreSQL transaction, please use await tx.get()
db_postgresTxExecuteHint: In PostgreSQL transaction, please use await tx.execute()
db_sqliteOnlySqlite: SQLite Provider only supports sqlite type
db_sqliteAddColumnFailed: Failed to add column {columnName} to table {tableName}: {error}
db_sqliteDropColumnFailed: Failed to drop column {columnName} from table {tableName}: {error}
db_mysqlOnlyMysql: MySQL Provider only supports mysql type
db_mysqlTxQueryHint: In MySQL transaction, please use await tx.query()
db_mysqlTxGetHint: In MySQL transaction, please use await tx.get()
db_mysqlTxExecuteHint: In MySQL transaction, please use await tx.execute()
db_crudEmptyPayload: CRUD payload is empty, please provide data
db_crudNoValidColumns: CRUD payload has no valid columns
